name: harness
description: Canonical, stack-agnostic Claude Code harness: the /create-issue skill (goal → researched GitHub issue) and the /finish-pr skill (drive a PR to merge-ready — reconcile against drift, then implement & fix it), plus generic code-reviewer and test-runner subagents and SessionStart automation. Reusable across any repo; each project tailors its stack-specific bits (build/test commands, project guards, app skills) locally.
